title: CF_DocCentralV3_ArchiveDocument — Trigger Input Schema
description: Inputs passed from the Canvas App to the ArchiveDocument flow via Power Apps V2 trigger.

documentsJson.description: JSON-serialized array of documents to archive. The Canvas App serializes with JSON() before calling the flow. Passed as Text because Power Apps V2 trigger does not support native Array type.

delovodniBroj.description: Human-readable registry number — used in log messages and failure entries. Not used for lookups.

arhivskiZnak.description: Archive classification code — validated against App Config allowed values.

initiatorEmail.description: Email of the user performing the archiving. Written to the Arhivirao field on each archived document. Must be the logged-in user's email — validated by Canvas App, not re-validated by the flow.

correlationId.description: Optional correlation ID for log tracing. If empty or omitted, the flow generates a GUID.

callerNotes.serialization: Canvas App must call JSON(documentsCollection) to serialize the documents array before passing to the flow.
callerNotes.batchSize: Recommended maximum 50 documents per call (UNKNOWN — confirm with client). Larger batches increase run duration and risk timeout.
callerNotes.archiveSignSource: The Canvas App should populate the arhivskiZnak field from the App Config archive signs list for UX validation. The flow re-validates authoritatively.
callerNotes.statusFilter: The Canvas App archive screen should show only documents with Stanje = Zavedeno. Documents in other states will fail per-document validation.

canvasAppCall.note: colSelectedDocs is a collection with columns documentItemId (number), delovodniBroj (text), arhivskiZnak (text).
